task_description: Replace lib/data.ts with MDX-based snippet system. Add Shiki syntax highlighting, multi-tab code blocks, tag filtering, copy-as-AI-prompt button, OG image generation, and expand snippet library to 12+ production-quality entries across Splunk, React/Next.js, Python, and Bash/DevOps categories.

verification.summary: npm run build generates 29 static pages (12 snippets + 12 OG images + landing + not-found + snippets index). npm run lint passes with no errors. @tailwindcss/typography installed, metadataBase set, clipboard feedback added, webpack config documented. Semantic review v2 APPROVED.
